name: nanobanana-mcp
description: Gemini image generation, editing, and vision for Claude Desktop
long_description: MCP server that brings Google Gemini's multimodal capabilities to Claude. Generate configurable 1K, 2K, or 4K images, edit existing images with natural language, chat with vision support, and maintain style consistency across sessions. Supports both Flash (fast) and Pro (high quality) models with runtime switching.

tools.name: gemini_chat
tools.description: Chat with Gemini model with multi-turn conversations and up to 10 reference images

tools.name: gemini_generate_image
tools.description: Generate 1K, 2K, or 4K images with session-based style consistency and optional per-request image size override

tools.name: gemini_edit_image
tools.description: Edit existing images with natural language prompts and optional per-request image size override

tools.name: set_aspect_ratio
tools.description: Set aspect ratio for image generation and editing

tools.name: set_image_size
tools.description: Set output image size to 1K, 2K, or 4K for a session

tools.name: set_model
tools.description: Switch between Flash (fast) and Pro (high quality) models

tools.name: get_image_history
tools.description: View generated/edited images in a session

tools.name: clear_conversation
tools.description: Reset conversation context and image history

api_key.title: Google AI API Key
api_key.description: Your Google AI Studio API key (get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)
